title: The Golden Enclosure
lines: The air here is a heavy, suffocating shroud of ozone and sun-scorched grass. You stand before a cyclopean, geometric enclosure of reinforced obsidian-glass and pulsing orange moss that seems to breathe with a slow, tectonic rhythm.

In the center of the artificial savannah, a majestic entity sits in absolute stillness. It is not a beast of bone and fur, but a shimmering golden silhouette—a construct of light and shadow that looks as if it were carved from the very essence of a dying desert sun.
Its eyes are not eyes, but two tiny, intensely glowing terminal-green lights that watch your every movement with a cold, absolute, and predatory calculation. It is a sentinel of the void.

options.desc: 1. Tap on the reinforced glass to challenge the golden sentinel
2. Carefully back away from the enclosure and its glowing gaze
